title: Scalar upwind weights are nonnegative under the CFL condition

source.notes: Structural CFL seed: 0 <= cfl <= 1 implies both convex-combination weights are nonnegative.

informal.statement: If 0 <= cfl <= 1, then the scalar upwind weights 1 - cfl and cfl are both nonnegative.
informal.expected_conclusion: Both scalar upwind weights are nonnegative.

declarations.name: upwindWeights_nonneg
declarations.statement: theorem upwindWeights_nonneg (cfl : ℝ) (hcfl0 : 0 ≤ cfl) (hcfl1 : cfl ≤ 1) : 0 ≤ 1 - cfl ∧ 0 ≤ cfl

tasks.input: Translate the CFL nonnegative-weight statement into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem upwindWeights_nonneg (cfl : ℝ) (hcfl0 : 0 ≤ cfl) (hcfl1 : cfl ≤ 1) : 0 ≤ 1 - cfl ∧ 0 ≤ cfl

tasks.input: Given the theorem statement, complete the Lean 4 proof.
tasks.target: A proof using constructor and linarith.
